title: Section 1
content: (1) This Act may be called the Marine Insurance Act, 1963. (2) It shall come into force on such date 1 as the Central Government may, by notification in the Official Gazette, appoint.
footnote: 1. 1st August, 1963, vide notification No. S.O. 1925, dated 8th July, 1963, see Gazette of India, Extraordinary, Part II, sec. 3(ii).
